# function: op_header_check

The HTTP header comparison operation. The operators can be one of `equals`, `not_equal`, `less_than`, `greater_than`, `always`, or `never`. The operands must be constructed using either `op_header_operand_literal` or `op_header_operand_glob`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
output "operand" {
  value = provider::sentry::op_header_check(
    # Key
    "equals",
    provider::sentry::op_header_operand_literal("X-Header-Key"),
    # Value
    "equals",
    provider::sentry::op_header_operand_glob("pattern-*"),
  )
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
op_header_check(key_operator string, key_operand string, value_operator string, value_operand string) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `key_operator` (String) The operator to use when matching the header key. Can be one of `equals`, `not_equal`, `less_than`, `greater_than`, `always`, or `never`.
1. `key_operand` (String) The header key operand.
1. `value_operator` (String) The operator to use when matching the header value. Can be one of `equals`, `not_equal`, `less_than`, `greater_than`, `always`, or `never`.
1. `value_operand` (String) The header value operand.
